prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TINDER-STICKS-12-PACK-IH Product Type: SOLID_FIRE_FUEL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Water Resistant Slow Burning Tinder Sticks 12 Pack ASR Outdoor Description: There's nothing like the warmth and light of a campfire after a long day of hiking, camping, swimming, or backpacking. These lightweight tinder sticks can go with you anywhere to ensure you can have that perfect campfire at any time.

At just 4 inches long, these compact sticks can go in your pocket or backpack and can be transported with ease. They are water resistant as well, so you don't have to worry about them getting wet or staring a fire when its damp.

Tinder sticks come in a value pack of 12. Each stick is slow burning and takes 5 minutes to burn the exterior. Don't forget these next camping trip. Search Terms: fire supplies outdoors sticks tinder survival hiking camping starter campfire backpacking emergency Features: - BUGOUT BAG READY: This survivalist and hiker essential is pocket sized and lightweight so you will always have room for them in an emergency kit or daypack. - SLOW BURNING: It takes 5 minutes to burn the exterior giving you plenty of time to stoke you campfire and get your kindling to catch. - WATER RESISTANT: Dry and resistant to wet environments our Tinder Sticks can help you get your fire started even if conditions aren't perfect. - NON TOXIC: Doesn't contain chemicals harmful to the wilderness - 12 PACK: Package includes twelve sticks for prolonged hiking trips or survival situations that require several days of fire starting === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12-Pack Water Resistant Tinder Sticks

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12-Pack Water Resistant Tinder Sticks

anthropic.title_differentiation: Slow Burning, Water Resistant, 5 Minute Burn Time, Lightweight, Non Toxic, Survival Ready

openai.title_differentiation: Slow Burning 5 Minute Exterior Burn, Pocket Sized Bugout Ready, Non Toxic, Wet Conditions Ready, Campfire Aid
